src/main/java/org/prebid/cache/PBCacheAp.general_idea: Replace deprecated allowedOrigins with allowedOriginPatterns to support wildcard origins in Spring WebFlux on Java 17.

src/main/java/org/prebid/cache/config/Ci.general_idea: Update CircuitBreakerConfig builder methods to match the newer Resilience4j API signatures.
src/main/java/org/prebid/cache/config/Ci.human_impl: Replaced ringBufferSizeInHalfOpenState/ClosedState with permittedNumberOfCallsInHalfOpenState and slidingWindow.

src/main/java/org/prebid/cache/config/Ci.general_idea: Remove the explicit CircuitBreakerHealthIndicator bean definition.
src/main/java/org/prebid/cache/config/Ci.human_impl: Deleted the healthIndicator() method and its import.

src/main/java/org/prebid/cache/repositor.general_idea: Update the import statement for the Retry class to reflect its new package location in Reactor Core 3.4+.
Refactor the retry policy construction to use the new fluent API introduced in Reactor Core 3.4, replacing the deprecated builder methods.
Adjust indentation of method arguments to align with the new code style or editor settings.
src/main/java/org/prebid/cache/repositor.human_impl:
new AerospikeWriteListener(sink, normalizedId), policy,
                        new Key(...)

src/test/java/org/prebid/cache/handlers/.general_idea: Replace standard Awaitility calls with a custom utility method to encapsulate waiting and verification logic.
Remove imports for classes no longer used in the file after refactoring the await logic.
Use 'var' and 'final' keywords for local variable declarations to align with modern Java coding standards.
src/test/java/org/prebid/cache/handlers/.human_impl: Changed 'Consumer<ServerResponse> consumer =' to 'final Consumer<ServerResponse> consumer =' and 'postRequestedFor(...)' to 'final var requestPatternBuilder = postRequestedFor(...)'

pom.xml.general_idea: Update the target Java version property from 11 to 17 to align with the migration goal.
Upgrade Spring Boot parent from 2.1.6 to 2.6.7, which is required for Java 17 support.
Update maven-compiler-plugin to 3.10.1 to ensure compatibility with Java 17 compilation.
Update maven-surefire-plugin to 3.0.0-M6 to support running tests on Java 17.
Add explicit javax.validation-api dependency to resolve module system conflicts in Java 17.
Increment project version to 1.15.0-SNAPSHOT for the new development iteration.
Add properties to control skipping unit and functional tests.
Update Lettuce client to 6.1.8.RELEASE for better Java 17 compatibility.
Update Gson library to 2.9.0.
Update Guava library to 31.1-jre.
Update Caffeine cache library to 3.0.6.
Update Disruptor library to 3.4.4.
Update Lombok to 1.18.24 for Java 17 support.
Update Reflections library to 0.10.2.
Update EqualsVerifier to 3.10.
Update Aerospike client to 5.1.11.
Update Reactor Extra to 3.4.8.
Update WireMock to 2.27.2.
Update Checkstyle Maven plugin to 3.1.2.
Update Checkstyle core to 10.2.
Update JaCoCo plugin to 0.8.8.
Update Awaitility to 4.2.0.
Update Resilience4j to 1.7.1.
Update Log4j2 to 2.17.2 to address security vulnerabilities.
Update Maven Release plugin to 3.0.0-M5.
Update Maven Source plugin to 3.2.1.
Update Maven Clean plugin to 3.2.0.
Add Kotlin standard library dependency for functional tests.
Add Kotlinx Coroutines dependency for functional tests.
Add Kotest runner dependency for functional tests.
Add Testcontainers dependency for functional tests.
Add Testcontainers Mockserver module dependency for functional tests.
Add Mockserver client dependency for functional tests.
Add Ktor client core dependency for functional tests.
Add Ktor client Apache engine dependency for functional tests.
Add Ktor content negotiation dependency for functional tests.
Add Ktor Jackson serialization dependency for functional tests.
Add Jackson Kotlin module dependency for functional tests.
Configure Surefire plugin to skip tests based on property.
Set system property to disable container launch in unit tests.
Add Failsafe plugin configuration for integration tests.
Add Kotlin Maven plugin to compile test sources.
Add Docker Maven plugin to build containers for integration tests.
Configure JaCoCo plugin to skip coverage when unit tests are skipped.
Update Maven repository URL from HTTP to HTTPS.

.github/workflows/pr-java-ci.yml.general_idea: Update the CI matrix to target Java 17 instead of Java 11 to align with the migration goal.
Upgrade the checkout action to v3 for better performance and support.
Upgrade the setup-java action to v3 and configure Temurin distribution with built-in caching.
Remove the manual Maven cache step since setup-java@v3 handles caching natively.
.github/workflows/pr-java-ci.yml.human_impl: removed: - name: Cache Maven dependendcies ... uses: actions/cache@v1

checkstyle.xml.general_idea: Relocated the LineLength check module from inside the TreeWalker to the root module level to enforce line length checks on package and import statements as well.
checkstyle.xml.human_impl: Moved <module name="LineLength"> block outside of <module name="TreeWalker">

src/test/resources/application.propertie.general_idea: Increase the cache timeout in test configuration to prevent flaky tests or timeouts during functional testing.
